summary: Iteration 106 - ROI Comparison Dashboard, Revenue Sharing Dashboard, Gemini Dense Embeddings. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: ROI Calculator with Compare view, Revenue Sharing page with empty state, period selectors all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ROI Comparison endpoints properly aggregate data from user's owned/member workspaces
Revenue dashboard returns proper structure with creator/buyer sections and 20% platform fee
Gemini embeddings module correctly implements cosine similarity and batch processing
Agent pricing endpoints properly validate price_usd (>=0, <=10000) and pricing_model (one_time|monthly)
Dense embeddings use task_type='RETRIEVAL_QUERY' for queries vs 'RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT' for documents
_semantic_select in agent_knowledge_retrieval.py prioritizes: dense embeddings → BM25 → TF-IDF fallback

success_rate.frontend: 100% (ROI Comparison, Revenue Sharing, and period selectors all verified)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing workspaces and empty transaction collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 106 features fully verified: 1) ROI Comparison - GET /api/roi-comparison/workspaces returns workspace comparison data with all fields (cost, calls, tokens, messages, roi_multiplier, efficiency_score, agent_count, knowledge_chunks). GET /api/roi-comparison/trend returns daily cost trends per workspace. 2) Revenue Dashboard - GET /api/marketplace/revenue/dashboard returns creator (earnings, sales, platform_fee=20%, per_agent, recent_transactions) and buyer (total_purchases, purchases) sections. Empty state handled with $0 earnings. 3) Agent Pricing - PUT/GET /api/marketplace/agents/{agent_id}/pricing with validation (404 for non-existent agents). 4) Gemini Embeddings - Module imports correctly, cosine_similarity_dense works, constants (GEMINI_MODEL='gemini-embedding-001', EMBEDDING_DIM=768, BATCH_SIZE=50) correct. 5) Frontend UI - ROI Calculator shows Calculator/Compare toggle, Compare view shows workspace table + cost distribution + resource cards, Revenue page shows 4 stat cards + empty state message. Period selectors (7d/30d/90d) functional.

roi_comparison_backend.workspaces_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/roi-comparison/workspaces?period=30d returns workspaces array with all required fields
roi_comparison_backend.trend_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/roi-comparison/trend?period=30d returns trends object with workspace_name and daily array

revenue_sharing_backend.dashboard_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/marketplace/revenue/dashboard returns creator and buyer sections
revenue_sharing_backend.creator_structure: PASS - Has total_earnings_usd, total_sales, platform_fee_pct (20%), per_agent, recent_transactions
revenue_sharing_backend.empty_state: PASS - Returns $0 earnings and 0 sales when no transactions

gemini_embeddings_module.import: PASS - All functions importable (generate_embeddings, generate_query_embedding, cosine_similarity_dense, compute_and_store_dense_embeddings, retrieve_with_dense_embeddings)
gemini_embeddings_module.cosine_similarity: PASS - Correct calculation for identical (1.0), orthogonal (0.0), opposite (-1.0) vectors
gemini_embeddings_module.edge_cases: PASS - Handles empty vectors, mismatched lengths, zero vectors

frontend_roi_calculator.comparison_view: PASS - Shows workspace table, cost distribution, resource cards
frontend_roi_calculator.stat_cards: PASS - 4 StatCards (Total Cost, Time Saved, ROI Multiplier, Messages)

frontend_revenue_sharing.stats_cards: PASS - 4 cards (Earnings, Total Sales, Platform Fee, Purchases)

mocked_apis.note: Stripe Checkout uses test key sk_test_emergent - this is a real test key for development
